name: Innuovo Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Innuovo Technology Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, engages in the research and development, production, and sale of rare earth permanent magnet materials in China. It also develops and produces automated logistics system integration and related equipment; lifting equipment, such as roadway stacking machines; and conveyors, including drums, suspensions, and plate chains, shelves, and rolled profiles, as well as provides electrical machinery and equipment. In addition, Innuovo Technology Co., Ltd. provides logistics management software that consists of warehouse management system and equipment control system. The company's products are used in the fields of aerospace, mechanical instrumentation, and medical equipment. The company was formerly known as Taiyuan Shuangta Ganyu Co., Ltd. Innuovo Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 1997 and is based in Taiyuan, China.
